utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all seven of these items. Each one is well-specified: destination (Prague) provided; travel_dates (September 25–29, 2024) provided; transportation includes flight details and cost; accommodation includes hotel name and cost; activities list several activities with individual costs; additional_services lists dining budget and cost; and total_budget gives total cost. All required details are present and complete.
